title: RatingStore Contract v1
description: Contract for RatingStore persistence boundary: save_rating, load_rating, and load_all_ratings results.

save_rating_result.title: save_rating Result
save_rating_result.description: Result of RatingStore.set_rating() — confirms a rating was persisted for a team/sport.

team.description: Name of the team/player whose rating was saved.

rating.description: The Elo rating value that was persisted.

sport.description: Sport code (e.g. MLB, NFL, NBA, EPL).

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the rating was saved.

load_rating_result.title: load_rating Result
load_rating_result.description: Result of RatingStore.get_rating() — a team's current rating, or null if not found.

team.description: Name of the team/player whose rating was requested.

rating.description: Current Elo rating for the team, or null if not found.

found.description: Whether the team was found in the store.

load_all_ratings_result.title: load_all_ratings Result
load_all_ratings_result.description: Result of RatingStore.get_all_ratings() — all ratings for a sport.

sport.description: Sport code these ratings belong to.

ratings.description: Map of team names (uppercase abbreviations) to Elo ratings.

count.description: Number of ratings in the map.
